title: Household income and wealth
summary: Reports HILDA-based median equivalised weekly disposable household income of AUD 1192 in June 2023 prices.
comparability_notes: The 2022-23 point is HILDA-derived; the latest comparable SIH point shown is 2019-20.

title: Survey of Income and Housing results will not be released
summary: ABS did not release the 2023-24 SIH because collection and questionnaire problems prevented the data from meeting official-statistics quality standards.
comparability_notes: Establishes a current cross-sectional data gap; unpublished figures must not be used.

title: Australian National Accounts: National Income Expenditure and Product March 2026
summary: Reports household saving to income ratio of 6.2 percent in March quarter 2026.
comparability_notes: Macro household-sector flow; cannot represent median or young households.

title: Australian National Accounts Finance and Wealth March 2026
summary: Reports household wealth of AUD 19211.9 billion and quarterly financing-account positions.
comparability_notes: Macro stock values do not identify distribution or liquidity of typical households.
